name: Melitzanokeftethes Kroketes (Eggplant Croquettes)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kefalotiri cheese, grated OR 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the eggplants and pierce them in several places with a fork.
2. Boil them in lightly salted water until tender, then drain well.
3. Remove the skin and mash the pulp.
4. Measure the mashed eggplant pulp.
5. Mix 2 cups of mashed eggplant with the remaining ingredients from "THE MIXTURE" section and blend well.
6. Shape the mixture into croquettes or patties.
7. Roll each croquette in cracker meal.
8. Fry until golden brown.
